items.deck: The iNaturalist cellphone app not only helps users identify plant, animal and insect species; it also provides invaluable data to scientists studying biodiversity, species decline, and habitat loss - and, as Martha Stewart discovers, it's fun!

items.title: Hawaii's worst flooding in 20 years caused over $1BILLION in damage as crews desperately search for woman swept away in deluge

items.title: Trump's White House ballroom architect 'has totally baffled colleagues' by taking on controversial project

items.title: The Global Water Crisis Is Also An Economic And Equity Crisis
items.deck: World Water Day 2026 highlights water and gender, showing how inequality impacts access, economies and resilience while solutions drive inclusive growth.

items.title: You're eating your hot cross buns WRONG! Experts reveal why you should cut yours into thirds to increase the surface area for butter

items.title: Outrage as Oklahoma couple allegedly used 14-year-old girl as SURROGATE for their twins

items.title: "On Our Way To Cuba": Left-Wing Nonprofit Boss Flies First Class For Virtue Signaling Tour
items.deck: "On Our Way To Cuba": Left-Wing Nonprofit Boss Flies First Class For Virtue Signaling Tour The head of a left-wing nonprofit, reportedly linked to a Marxist propaganda network connected to a China-based billionaire, flew first class while her supporters traveled in coach to Cuba.

items.title: Reckless tourists ignore 'danger no access' signs at popular Dorset beauty spot - despite path being closed over safety fears
items.deck: The famous stone arch of Durdle Door in Dorset can only be accessed by 143 wooden steps built into the steep 200ft cliff.
